title: triticum cylindricum var. rumelicum
intro: Triticum cylindricum var. rumelicum, also known as Rumelic wheat, is a type of wild wheat plant native to the Balkan Peninsula. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, due to its high content of phenolic compounds and essential oils. The health benefits of Rumelic wheat include reducing inflammation, fighting infections, and supporting digestive health. Rumelic wheat can be prepared as an herbal tea or infusion, or dried and used in herbal remedies such as capsules or tinctures.
